scripts.build: npm run build -w student-liff && npm run build -w tutor-pwa && npm run build -w admin-console
scripts.build:services: concurrently "npm run build -w identity-service" "npm run build -w learning-service" "npm run build -w finance-mlm-service"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently "npm run dev -w identity-service" "npm run dev -w learning-service" "npm run dev -w finance-mlm-service"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "proxy,services,student-liff,ngrok,tutor-pwa,admin-console" -c "magenta,green,blue,cyan,yellow,red" "cloud-sql-proxy.exe reading-advantage:asia-southeast1:cloud-sql --credentials-file=service-account.json" "npm run dev:services" "npm run dev -w student-liff" "ngrok http 3004" "npm run dev -w tutor-pwa" "npm run dev -w admin-console"
